'''Borthis''' was a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] in the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] who served as an instructor at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] alongside [[Hezzoran]], [[Kas'im]], [[Orilltha]], [[Shenayag]], and [[Qordis]]. When Kaan had all Sith summoned to [[Ruusan]] to destroy the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]], Borthis also went there to join them. They then gave up their life on Ruusan like all the other Sith of the Brotherhood of Darkness, except [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
